name: WebSky, Inc.
summary: WebSky, Inc. provides voice, data, and Internet services including local, long distance, and international call termination through voice and data wired and wireless connections. The company`s CDMA 1XRTT technology allows voice and data transmission services. WebSky, Inc. was formerly known as Telemais Telecommunications, Inc. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in San Francisco, California.
